titleStmt.title: SII 20.64: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 64. (B.K. No. 72 of 1936-37.) MALGHAṆ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab leaning against the right wall inside the Basavaṇṇa temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 25, Vikrama, Pushya, ba. 6, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1100, December 24.

It records a gift of land and house-site by Antaḥpura-verggaḍe and Daṇḍanāyaka Vāmadēvayya for worship and offerings to god Ādityadēva, Kēśavadēva and Vāmēśvaradēva which were installed by him at Mallagāṇa which was situated in Kummasi-30 of Tarddavāḍi-1000 division and which was a sarvvanamasya-agrahāra of Purāṇada Divākarabhaṭṭōpādhyāya. The king is stated to have been camping on the Bhīmarathi while proceeding to the west against Bhōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī © svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhu
vanamalladēvaru bhōjana mēle paścimadiśāvarakkettidalli bhīmaratiya tīradappaya
ṇadakuppadalu sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttaviralu . svastisamastaguṇasaṁpannaṁ nuḍidu
mattennaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ baṁdhujanapōṣaṇaṁ gōtravibhūṣaṇaṁ parāṁganāputrakaṁ vājikuḷaka
maḻabhriṁgaṁ sāhasōttuṁgaṁ Atrēyagōtrasamuddharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladē
vara pādārādhakaṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmadaṁtaḥpuraverggaḍe daṁḍanā
yakaṁ vāmadēvayyaṁgaḻu śrī tarddavāḍi sāsirada baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ kummasi mūvattaṟo
ḷagaṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara paramārādhyarappa śrīmatpurāṇada divākarabhaṭṭō
pādhyāyara sarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ mallagāṇadalu śrīmadādityadēvarumaṁ
śrī kēśavadēvarumaṁ śrī vāmēśvaradēvarumaṁ pratiṣThe māḍidā dēvargge svasti śrīmaccā
ḻukyavikramakālada 25 neya vikrama saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 6 sōmavāra
Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu tamma mallugāṇada nālkuvrittiyoḻage biṭṭa vritti Oṁ
māṇikēśvarada mattaru mūvattaroḷage dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dhūpadīpa nivēdyakkaṁ biṭṭa ma
pūjārige mattaru hattu Antu ma 30 Ā baḷiya hattu kaiyagala 25 kaiyya nīḷa
nivēśana Oṁdu 19 kai Agala 20 kai nīḷada baṇabeya nivēśana Oṁdu © .
Digital edition of SII 20.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
